properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v2 v1 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Search my heart, search my soul Take my shame, take it deep within Search my heart, search my soul Take my sin, lead me back to You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: By Your precious blood, I will dwell in You By Your righteousness, I will walk By Your gracious love, I will seek Your name By Your righteousness I will walk, I will walk with You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Search my heart, search my soul In this wilderness, I'm lost deep within Search my heart, search my soul Lead my path, lead me back to You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Search my heart, search my soul Take my sin, lead me back to You
